docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-09-2010 - JUDGMENT.
CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED AS TO DEFENDANT GRANT, MICHAEL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-09-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-09-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: SVANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHIRAZI, LIDIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GRANT, MICHAEL $847.91 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $877.91, DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE REQUIRMENTS OF CIVIL CODE SECTION 1950.5 RESULTS IN FORFEITURE OF HIS RIGHT TO OFFSET AGAINST PLAINTIFF'S SECURITY DEPOSIT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-25-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GRANT, MICHAEL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $800.00 FILED BY SHIRAZI, LIDIA AS TO DEFENDANT GRANT, MICHAEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-09-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT GRANT, MICHAEL
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
